items.title: This is the craziest coincidence in NBA history...
items.author: NBA Stat
items.body_excerpt:
This is the craziest coincidence in NBA history...

11 years and 13 days ago, Steph Curry had the exact same statline as Wemby did, in the exact same scenario:
down 2-1 vs the Grizzlies, and went on to win the title.

(via KlawWrld)
#NBA

items.title: There are only 7 in NBA history who have played at least 80 postseason games and have averaged 25+ PPG and 5+ APG:
items.author: NBA Stat
items.body_excerpt:
There are only 7 in NBA history who have played at least 80 postseason games and have averaged 25+ PPG and 5+ APG:

LeBron James
Michael Jordan
Jerry West
Stephen Curry
Nikola Jokić
Giannis Antetokounmpo
Jalen Brunson

(via DJ Zullo)
#NBA
